recommendations.title: Happy Christmas
recommendations.overview: After a breakup with her boyfriend, a young woman moves in with her older brother, his wife, and their 2-year-old son.

recommendations.title: Win It All
recommendations.overview: A gambling addict faces a conflict when entrusted with keeping a bunch of money that isn't his.

recommendations.title: Digging for Fire
recommendations.overview: Tim and Lee are married with a young child. The chance to stay at a fancy home in the Hollywood Hills is complicated by Tim's discovery of a bone and a rusty old gun in the yard. Tim is excited by the idea of a mystery, but Lee doesn't want him to di

recommendations.title: V/H/S
recommendations.overview: When a group of misfits is hired by an unknown third party to burglarize a desolate house and acquire one rare VHS tape, they discover more found footage than they had bargained for.
recommendations.director: Tyler Gillett, David Bruckner, Glenn McQuaid, Joe Swanberg, Ti West, Justin Martinez, Adam Wingard, Chad Villella, Matt Bettinelli-Olpin

recommendations.title: Pearl
recommendations.overview: Trapped on her family’s isolated farm, Pearl must tend to her ailing father under the bitter and overbearing watch of her devout mother. Lusting for a glamorous life like she’s seen in the movies, Pearl’s ambitions, temptations, and repressions colli

recommendations.title: God's Own Country
recommendations.overview: A young farmer in rural Yorkshire numbs his daily frustrations with binge drinking and casual sex, until the arrival of a Romanian migrant worker.

recommendations.title: Labor Day
recommendations.overview: Two strangers are drawn together under incredible circumstances. What starts as an unforeseen encounter over a long holiday weekend soon becomes a second chance love story.

recommendations.title: X
recommendations.overview: In 1979, a group of young filmmakers set out to make an adult film in rural Texas, but when their reclusive, elderly hosts catch them in the act, the cast find themselves fighting for their lives.

recommendations.title: House
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find a sense of connection to her late mother, Gorgeous takes a trip with her friends to visit her aunt's ancestral house in the countryside. The girls soon discover that there is more to the old house than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: Get Married If You Can
recommendations.overview: Ana Paula catches her fiancé cheating. After a night of drinking, she wakes up far from home, not so certain she wants to go back.
